ab: 2022 no kawan, pikaygi da abnekan no seyvo o ngaran do mibonsyow no yancomin.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名的會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: pacicihen ko masanib a mazyak no vazay a abneken o mibonsyo no yancomin si Tahaw tao do pangso.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年si Tahaw。
en: I interviewed si Tahaw, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: yaken kani ya misirisiring namen a si niciyo ranam mangay ko do vahay da a pacicien.
ch: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: pacicinen ko na do vahay da ka panci na jiaken so nikapwan no ngaran na, a ka pitotwaw da saka vahay ipakasingkad ko jira saka vahay kano sira sakayli.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: pacicien ko ikongo o mo kazyakan nya do paliten o ngaran no yancomin. marahet o adan a ipadket so ngaran?
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

ab: koan na yaken ni Tahaw, ta manoyong o pipipangayan no ngaran do cyokok, aro sira manci nyaken A-na, ikaro a malas a mapaming dang.
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的傳達他的名字，其他人還會叫他「 A-na」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \"A-na,\" which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: koan na ni Tahaw am, “vatvatkan no yancomin a manoyong a ngaran namen do tao. ikasawop namen malayma tao do pongso, mapo ya do nyapowan namen, ngaran namen do pongso a makdeng ya, inaoy no aroa tao mababnek so ngaran do tao a yancomin.”
ch: si Tahaw說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找回自己的名字。」
en: si Tahaw said, \"The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.\"
